title: robot_agentic_training_flow objective spec
description: Machine-checkable MIRROR of the prose objective contract. `objective.example.yaml` remains the canonical, human-authored schema (robot_agentic_training_flow.md Step 0); this file lets `agentic-robot validate` enforce the same field shapes. Unknown fields are tolerated (additionalProperties: true) exactly as the flow tolerates them (robot_agentic_training_flow.md: an unrecognized field is recorded and ignored).

acceptance.description: Optional metric VECTOR checked by the locked acceptance gate — one entry per metric that must hold before the run is accepted. Kept separate from the single optimization metric (metric_path) so no round can be selected on it. See objective.example.yaml for the worked example (success_rate, unsafe_success_rate, p95_control_latency_ms, prior_task_retention).

acceptance_eval.description: Optional LOCKED-HOLDOUT acceptance evaluation: seeds, perturbations, tasks, and environments that never guide action selection (they are read only by the acceptance gate, never between rounds). Point eval_command at a holdout harness — e.g. LIBERO-PRO (arxiv 2510.03827) or vla-eval (github.com/allenai/vla-evaluation-harness). Must write {eval_dir}/eval_info.json in the same shape as the selection eval_command.

seeds.description: Locked holdout seeds — fixed for the life of the run.

perturbations.description: Named perturbation suites (e.g. object, state, instruction, environment).
